case_title: INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS VS. KEN WINN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,587.01 FILED BY INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS AS TO DEFENDANT WINN, KEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS AS TO DEFENDANT WINN, KEN
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED. UNABLE TO FORWARD

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
